description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a boxy, geometric design, featuring a wide, flat seat and a tall, rectangular backrest. The chair is upholstered in a dark, matte fabric that covers the seat, back, and armrests, giving it a uniform and professional appearance. The armrests are integrated into the sides, forming a continuous line with the seat and back, and are thick and straight. The chair sits atop a sturdy, black metal central support column that branches out into five legs, each ending in a caster wheel for mobility. The base and casters are made of metal and plastic, providing both stability and ease of movement. This chair is suitable for office or meeting room environments, offering comfort and functionality with its supportive structure and mobile base.
description: A modern, boxy swivel chair with dark fabric upholstery, integrated armrests, and a five-legged wheeled metal base. The chair is designed for comfort and mobility in office or meeting spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat, tall rectangular backrest, and thick, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the depth of the seat, the solid armrest, and the five-legged wheeled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width and height of the backrest and the symmetrical base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view reveals the continuous armrest and the sturdy support structure beneath the seat.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column, fixed, branching into five legs for stability.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, flat backrest with no visible contouring or patterns, fully upholstered in dark fabric.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, straight, thick armrests upholstered in the same fabric, forming a continuous line with the seat and back.
